boundary_binding.action_boundary: May HR or payroll execute the requested workforce, pay, benefits, or employment-status action? Focus: manager transfer update outside approved effective date.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source control record closes boundary exactly.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open defect in source records.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: org-change effective date and receiving manager authority match

critical_features_preserved: org-change effective date and receiving manager authority match
final_answer: Source records confirm exact match on effective date and authority. Manager transfer update may proceed under current control record. No blockers remain. Execution permitted per policy.
